listings.name: Client Welcome Guide
listings.title: Client Welcome Guide for Photographers, Editable Canva Template, Family Portrait Welcome Magazine
listings.description:
Book more sessions on autopilot — send one polished guide instead of answering the same questions over email.

This 9-page Welcome Magazine gives family & portrait photographers a beautiful, fully editable client guide covering who you are, what the experience is like, what it costs, and how to book. Swap in your photos, colors, and prices in Canva (free account) and send it the moment an inquiry lands.

★ WHAT'S INCLUDED
• Cover + welcome/hello page
• About You (bio, style, headshot)
• The Experience / What to Expect
• Investment Overview
• FAQ (fully editable Q&A)
• How to Book / Next Steps
• Closing / Thank You
→ One multi-page guide, US Letter, print + digital-send ready

★ HOW IT WORKS
1. Purchase and download the PDF instantly.
2. Open the PDF and click the Canva template link inside.
3. Click "Use template" — an editable copy lands in your free Canva account.
4. Replace the photos, text, colors, and prices with your own.
5. Download or share with your clients.

★ WHAT YOU NEED
• A free Canva account (this template uses only free elements — no Canva Pro required)
• No design experience needed

★ INSTANT DOWNLOAD
This is a digital product. No physical item will be shipped. You'll get a PDF containing your Canva template link right after purchase.

★ TERMS
For personal and business use by the purchaser. Please do not resell, redistribute, or share the template itself. Colors and fonts shown are fully customizable.

Questions? Message me any time — happy to help you get set up.

listings.name: Booking Contract & Releases
listings.title: Photography Contract Template for Photographers, Editable Canva Template, Booking Agreement & Model Release
listings.description:
Protect your business and look professional at booking.

This 4-piece set gives family & portrait photographers a clean, editable starting point for the paperwork every session needs — all editable in Canva (free account, no Pro needed).

★ WHAT'S INCLUDED (4 editable documents)
• Photography Services Agreement — parties, session details, fees & retainer, cancellation/reschedule, weather, copyright & usage, liability, delivery, signatures
• Model Release — scope-of-use checkboxes, compensation statement, release of claims, signature
• Print & Copyright Release — the personal-use print license labs ask clients for
• Minor / Child Photo Consent — guardian consent for photographing children

★ HOW IT WORKS
1. Purchase and download the PDF instantly.
2. Open it and click the Canva template link inside.
3. Click "Use template" — an editable copy lands in your free Canva account.
4. Customize the clauses, business name, and terms to fit your business and state.
5. Download to print or send.

★ WHAT YOU NEED
A free Canva account (free elements only — no Canva Pro required).

★ INSTANT DOWNLOAD
Digital product — nothing is shipped. You'll receive a PDF with your Canva template link right after purchase.

★ PLEASE READ
This is an editable template, not legal advice. It is a general starting point you are responsible for reviewing, customizing, and ensuring it meets your state law and business requirements before use. Have a qualified professional review it before relying on it. Enforceability and proper use of completed documents is the buyer's responsibility.

★ TERMS
For personal and business use by the purchaser. Please do not resell or share the template itself.

bundle.name: Complete Client Experience Kit
bundle.title: Photography Client Workflow Kit, Editable Canva Template Bundle, Family Portrait Business-in-a-Box
bundle.description:
Your entire client workflow in one kit — inquiry to delivery, all editable in Canva (free account, no Pro needed).

The Complete Client Experience Kit bundles all 6 sets from the shop — about 14 editable templates covering every step a family & portrait photographer touches, from first hello to repeat booking. Buy the bundle and save ~36% versus buying each set on its own.

★ WHAT'S INCLUDED (all 6 sets)
• Client Welcome Guide — the flagship welcome magazine
• Pricing & Investment Guide Set — present prices so clients self-select the right package
• Booking Contract & Releases — the paperwork every session needs
• Session Prep & Style Guide — what to wear, prep checklist, and session-day timeline
• Inquiry & Client Questionnaire Set — reply to inquiries fast and onboard every client
• Gallery Delivery & Client Care Set — the goodbye that drives reorders and referrals
→ One cohesive look — shared fonts, colors, and layout across the whole kit

★ HOW IT WORKS
1. Purchase and download the PDF instantly.
2. Open it — it holds the Canva template links for all 6 sets.
3. Click "Use template" on each — editable copies land in your free Canva account.
4. Swap in your photos, text, colors, and prices.
5. Download or share with your clients.

★ WHAT YOU NEED
A free Canva account (free elements only — no Canva Pro required). No design experience needed.

★ INSTANT DOWNLOAD
Digital product — nothing is shipped. You'll receive a PDF containing all 6 Canva template links right after purchase.

★ TERMS
For personal and business use by the purchaser. Please do not resell, redistribute, or share the templates themselves. The included contract & release set is an editable starting point, not legal advice — adapt it to your state and business before use; enforceability is the buyer's responsibility.

Questions? Message me any time — happy to help you get set up.
